text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text:
『In the Arima Kinen, T.M. Opera O had no 
chance of winning. Trapped in a pack with 
no light shining through, she nonetheless—』

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text:
『She made that run. Weaving through the pack, 
she seized an unprecedented victory. She would 
later say—"If there is no precedent, I'll just make one"』

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text:
『In an interview, Grass Wonder told us: 
"I pulled the Arima victory towards me. With sheer willpower"
—And that was the result』

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: 『It was a narrow victory for her. However, instead of following the legends built by the predecessors who won the Arima—she sought her own best, and the result was that peak』

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: 『Speed Symboli. The first Horsegirl in history to achieve three consecutive Grand Prix victories. She spoke of her final run like this—"In the end, it comes down to guts"』

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: 『A victory by a neck over the runner-up. It wasn't about repeating the previous year's Arima Kinen. Her final run was meant to surpass her own great achievements—』

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer… Trainer. 
Th-That was… That was amazing…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: No, really… From my perspective, I always thought everyone was so calm, or rather… that they won because they were meant to win. That was the impression I had, but…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
But… yeah, that's right. Watching the footage again… 
they were just giving it their all. There was a gritty foundation of sheer tenacity and guts underlying it all—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I see… The ones who can make history are those who… 
even in a fiercely competitive race… can still seize victory with their "willpower."

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …There wasn't a single one. Not a single person who established history by "tracing" the past.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I don't think learning from the past is inherently wrong. However, to achieve greatness… maybe you need to put your own raw, authentic self on the stage—
choice_data_list: <size=32>Because the one running on the turf right now is you</size>
<size=32>Because the one running on the turf right now is you</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…………Me. 
Chrono Genesis on the stage…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the day of the Tracen Academy tour arrived. 
Chrono Genesis was—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Hah, hah, hah, hah—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (2200m on turf. The track condition is slightly heavy due to yesterday's rain. Situationally, this is close to the 『Takarazuka Kinen』 that Nakayama won—)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Outside of the middle of the pack… The position Nakayama took. But, when Orfevre ran, it was a little more…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Ghk! I'm overthinking again…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Can I produce the explosive power of a 
34.7-second final sprint? If I can't, I shouldn't 
be tracing the past.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Because the one running today is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
…I thought that it was becoming the run I wanted to see. 
Because during the mock race, what caught my eye was…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…I can hear Trainer's voice. 
Cheering for me. —Me, and no one else.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(That's right. The one running here today 
is—not the girls who wove history.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: It's me, who is still a nobody.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (In that case, I just need to use history as a "rough" reference. As long as I grasp the image, beyond that—!)

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! With 200m left, Chrono Genesis makes her final push! What a magnificent closing sprint! Will she reach the front?! Will she reach it?!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Up until now, I've been chasing after the back of history. 
I wanted to catch up… I wanted to be there, too.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (But that's wrong. I can't become a part of history that way. If I want to carve my own footprints as myself—)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I have to win… I want to win. I want to win! Against the Horsegirls who made history! Against the predecessors who left behind great achievements!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (And then… next time, I will—)

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Chrono Genesis crosses the finish line in 1st place! A victory by two lengths! She's shown off her true strength!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Way to go, Chrono Genesis!! That was a great run!!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
That was so moving! When's her debut?! 
We're looking forward to it!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(……Looking forward to my debut… 
Does that mean…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(That they want to follow my history… 
Is that what they're thinking?)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: —Ah, I see.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: This is how I should draw it…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …I'm back.
choice_data_list: <size=27>That was an amazing race. I'm looking forward to your next one!</size>
<size=27>That was an amazing race. I'm looking forward to your next one!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah, thank you so much. 
But, umm…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: The reason I was able to run like this is…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
……Did they feel like this, too? 
All of them…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…It's scary to say it out loud. 
But I have to take that step forward properly.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Because, for me… it has to be this person)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
U-Umm… Trainer… 
If you wouldn't mind…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…No. I want to ask this of you, specifically…! 
Please, won't you—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Create history with me?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: 『Countless true stories that make your heart leap with every turn of the page. And beyond them, someday—I, too』

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: 『Want to create a new history』

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: 『This is the story of my—of our challenge. (Writer C)』
